name: playwright-automation-framework
description: Enterprise-grade Playwright + TypeScript test automation framework with POM, parallel execution, and CI/CD integration
author: Yousuf Waqar <yousufwaqar7@gmail.com>

scripts.test: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS="--import tsx" npx playwright test --project=chromium --grep-invert "@external|@visual|@performance"
scripts.test:headed: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS="--import tsx" npx playwright test --project=chromium --headed --grep-invert @external
scripts.test:chrome: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS="--import tsx" npx playwright test --project=chromium --grep-invert @external
scripts.test:firefox: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS="--import tsx" npx playwright test --project=firefox --grep-invert @external
scripts.test:webkit: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS="--import tsx" npx playwright test --project=webkit --grep-invert @external
scripts.test:cross-browser: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS="--import tsx" npx playwright test --project=chromium --project=firefox --project=webkit --grep-invert "@external|@visual|@performance"
scripts.test:api: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS="--import tsx" npx playwright test --project=chromium tests/api/
scripts.test:smoke: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS="--import tsx" npx playwright test --project=chromium --grep @smoke --grep-invert @external
scripts.test:regression: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS="--import tsx" npx playwright test --project=chromium --grep @regression --grep-invert @external
scripts.test:functional: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS="--import tsx" npx playwright test --project=chromium --grep-invert "@external|@visual|@performance|@a11y|@security"
scripts.test:a11y: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS="--import tsx" npx playwright test --project=chromium --grep @a11y
scripts.test:security: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS="--import tsx" npx playwright test --project=chromium --grep @security
scripts.test:visual: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS="--import tsx" npx playwright test --project=chromium --grep @visual
scripts.test:visual:update: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS="--import tsx" npx playwright test --project=chromium --grep @visual --update-snapshots
scripts.test:performance: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS="--import tsx" npx playwright test --project=chromium --grep @performance
scripts.test:quality: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS="--import tsx" npx playwright test --project=chromium --grep-invert @external
scripts.test:external: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS="--import tsx" npx playwright test --project=chromium --grep @external
scripts.test:saucedemo: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS="--import tsx" npx playwright test --project=chromium --grep @saucedemo
scripts.test:theinternet: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS="--import tsx" npx playwright test --project=chromium --grep @theinternet
scripts.test:api:external: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS="--import tsx" npx playwright test --project=chromium tests/external/api/
scripts.test:unit: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS="--import tsx" npx playwright test --config=playwright.unit.config.ts
scripts.test:unit:coverage: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS="--import tsx" c8 npx playwright test --config=playwright.unit.config.ts
scripts.test:selfheal: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS="--import tsx" npx playwright test --project=chromium --grep @selfheal
scripts.allure:report: npm run allure:generate && npm run allure:open
